failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Regular maintenance and cleaning schedule for BPR valve
Install pressure relief valve and monitor pressure continuously

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=4.2 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform thermal runaway test at 130°C to ensure system stability
Conduct flow test with simulated solid deposition to evaluate BPR valve performance
